title: Schizachyrium parvifolium
taxonomy: Schizachyrium parvifolium is a member of the family Poaceae. It is classified in the genus Schizachyrium. The genus Schizachyrium is a group of perennial grasses native to North America. The plant is often referred to as little bluestem, a name that is commonly used for other species in the genus as well. It is a type of warm-season grass that thrives in a variety of environments.

It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with benefits including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections.
